creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text: The ports mentioned here had been removed to bitbucket and there has been some changes in the commit list including the LICENSE. But unfortunately there has not been any distfile released based on the new source. The versions mentioned in the Makefiles are the last released version which were released under GPLv2. So until new versions are released under the new LICENSE scheme the LICENSE should be GPLv2 not BSD3CLAUSE.
